author: y4rr
content: Movement 2 result: ResNet18, ResNet34, VGG11, VGG16 — all 4 PASS strict value-parity. VGG required source-side flattening (separate ReLU/Dropout/MaxPool flat-list entries) to match torchvision's features.{0,3,6...} indexing. ResNet50/ViT cross-cut still PASS. resnet18/34 and 4 VGG fixtures regenerated.
